label: Newton's law of universal gravitation
note: Concept framed Kepler's-laws->Newton; Kepler's laws have no node, anchors to the gravitation law.
Experiment to measure G; no node. Graph should gain 'Cavendish experiment'; would sit beneath Q134465.
Gravitational field strength g; distinct from the force law. Graph should gain 'Gravitational field'; downstream of Q134465.
Weightlessness / orbit as free fall; no node. Graph should gain 'Weightlessness'; downstream of Q134465.
Equivalence principle, inertial vs gravitational mass; no node. Graph should gain 'Equivalence principle'; relates to Q11423 Mass.

label: Angular velocity
note: Concept covers angular displacement/velocity/acceleration; only angular velocity has a node. Angular displ/accel nodes absent (see REPORT).
Centre of mass & stability; no node. Graph should gain 'Center of mass'; relates to Q11423 Mass.
Centrifugal/Coriolis fictitious forces; no node. Graph should gain 'Fictitious force'; relates to Q11402 Force.
Impulse J=integral F dt = delta p; distinct from momentum. Graph should gain 'Impulse'; nearest existing prerequisite Q41273 Momentum (NOT an identity -- do not collapse).

label: Work (physics)
note: Work-energy theorem links work to delta KE; anchors to Work node. Theorem itself (the equality) has no dedicated node.

label: Kinetic energy
note: Concept_en is 'Kinetic Energy'.
Power P=dW/dt; distinct from work. Graph should gain 'Power'; nearest existing prerequisite Q42213 Work (NOT an identity).
Simple machines & mechanical advantage; no node. Graph should gain 'Simple machine'/'Mechanical advantage'; relates to Q42213 Work.
Machine efficiency, ideal vs real; no node. Graph should gain 'Mechanical efficiency'; downstream of machines.

label: Potential energy
note: Gravitational PE -- a species of PE; collapses onto generic Potential energy. Graph should gain 'Gravitational potential energy' to split (see collapse note in REPORT).

label: Potential energy
note: Elastic PE -- a species of PE; collapses onto the SAME node as gravpe. Graph should gain 'Elastic potential energy' to split.

label: Kinetic energy
note: Rotational KE = 1/2 I omega^2; collapses onto generic Kinetic energy (same node as cars). Genuinely needs Q165618 Moment of inertia + Q161635 angular velocity; graph should gain 'Rotational kinetic energy'.

label: Conservation of energy
note: Concept_en 'Conservation of Mechanical Energy'; anchors to Conservation of energy. Mechanical-energy specialisation has no dedicated node.

Elastic/inelastic collisions; no node. Graph should gain 'Collision'; nearest prerequisites Q2305665 Conservation of momentum + Q46276 Kinetic energy (NOT an identity -- do not collapse onto momentumcons).

label: Temperature
note: Contrasts temperature vs thermal energy; anchors to Temperature. 'Thermal energy' node absent -- the contrast's other half is missing.
Conduction/convection/radiation; no node. Graph should gain 'Heat transfer'; relates to Q11466 Temperature (NOT an identity).
Specific heat capacity (material property); no node. Graph should gain 'Specific heat capacity'; relates to Q11466 Temperature (NOT an identity).
Latent heat -- energy exchanged at CONSTANT temperature; mapping to Temperature would be wrong. Graph should gain 'Latent heat'.
Laws of thermodynamics & entropy; no node ('Entropy' absent). Graph should gain 'Laws of thermodynamics' + 'Entropy'; relates to Q11379 Energy (NOT an identity).
